primary: Single Origin Coffees — Premium coffees sourced from specific regions and farms, highlighting unique flavor profiles.
Coffee Blends — Carefully crafted coffee blends designed for consistent and balanced flavor.
Coffee Subscriptions — Convenient recurring delivery of your favorite single origin or blended coffees.
Cascara — Dried coffee cherry for brewing a unique, fruity tea.
Brewing Equipment — High-quality tools and machines for optimal coffee preparation at home.
Merchandise — Branded apparel and drinkware to show your Madcap Coffee pride.
E Gift Cards — Digital gift cards for coffee, equipment, or merchandise.
Classes & Tours — Educational experiences to deepen your understanding and appreciation of coffee.
Wholesale Program — Partnership opportunities for businesses to serve Madcap Coffee.
secondary: STAY CONNECTED — FOR THOUGHTFUL UPDATES, NEW RELEASES, AND A CLOSER LOOK AT WHAT WE'RE BUILDING.

matches.primary: Madcap Coffee exists to reveal the craftsmanship and human connection behind every cup, transforming a daily ritual into something more intentional. Based in Michigan, we roast and serve specialty coffee in Grand Rapids and Detroit while partnering with cafes, restaurants, and markets through our wholesale program.
